message: Jake
Yuriko
Patricia
Gloria
Cindy
Kristy
Do you need something?
Since we're together, why don't we have a chat?
I’m not really in the mood.
Maybe just once.
I don't have anything to talk about.
There's really nothing to discuss.
To be honest, it's a bother.

It's close to the year.
They seem to be enjoying a conversation, but surely they aren’t talking about anything weird.
You never know what they might say.
Isn’t doing this just going to make the woman in front of me even more upset?
There's no room to look around.
The piercing gaze.
Right now, it feels like I'm in a world separated from everyone else.
Her mysterious Oriental eyes show a look of disdain.
The first impression is that she's a scary woman.
That’s the vibe.
The Mao Color long jacket,
shows off her good taste.
If she were friendly, it would be quite different.
I can't help but feel disappointed.
Her gaze feels cold; did I do something to bother her?
This chilly gaze...
Is she suggesting I did something?
I don't have anything I want to talk to you about.
Please don’t say such cold things.
You.
You're definitely Guy's friend, right?
Yes.
My name is Snipes.
No need to introduce yourself; I have no interest in who you are.
You were the one who discovered him, right?
Well, of course. So what?
No, it’s not like it means anything.
You really don't get it, do you? What do I mean?
I'm just a woman,
doing gentleman duties seriously.
Hurry up.
I want to go back.
Am I being investigated in your inquiry? If not, stop prying.
Give me a break!
I’m just talking!
I don’t really want to talk to you.
There’s nothing to discuss with a shady detective.
This party is a movie.
Major leaguer.
It’s supposed to showcase their faces. But if the star can’t make it, it’s pointless.
There are quite a few less people, huh?
Fewer people is fine.
Because this much is more relaxing.
You really understand her well.
Of course.
But, it didn't mean anything like this.
Are you talking about the party participants?
Yeah, that’s right. If it’s like this,
they should’ve given her a break. That kid’s schedule is tight.
You really are.
thinking about her, huh? Cindy is happy to team up with you.
W-what? Out of the blue! I don’t need your concern. We’re doing just fine, the two of us.
Maybe I should excuse myself early today.
That’s irrelevant to you.
I felt it was too early to appear in a movie. But the director insisted.
That alone.
is a sign she’s being recognized.
But I'm worried it won’t turn her into a crowd-pulling panda.
In reality,
I had intended to step her up to actress eventually, so it just got sped up a bit.
Are you feeling anxious about something?
Absolutely! Being with that pervy guy is tough.
It’s really a hassle.
Come on.
Guy isn't the weird guy you think he is.
That's not true. On our first meeting,
he hugged me.
Ah, I might have jumped the gun.
That has nothing to do with it.
? Who is that?
That's my companion. I hope he's not been rude.
Oh, that curious bundle of energy. Can't she be a little quieter?
You know her better than I do.
Are you asking silly questions to separate me from
the director's daughter?
You're the director's daughter, right?
Yes, that's right. She's a nice girl, isn't she?
That has nothing to do with me.
You should just talk to her directly.
You called me for something like this?
I don't want to talk about that kind of man.
Aren't you two getting along?
Well, we're not exactly on good terms.
I don't want to hear that name.
I don't want to get involved with guys like that.
Isn't she cute?
Yeah. I've seen her on TV and posters, but seeing her in person, she really is cute.
That girl has a shine that others don't possess. That shine is a talent that only the chosen ones have.
You're really into her, huh?
Of course. I'm her agent.
I’m the honored person who knows her better than anyone and knows how to polish her more than anyone.
From now on
she will shine even more. It’s an important time for her now. Please don’t interfere, okay?
To her, I’m just an old man.
You don’t really think that, do you?
Anyway, the present is what's important.
Don't get involved with that girl.
You see, this is a critical moment. I don't want any bad rumors circulating at a time like this.
I understand that, but I'm just saying,
you're a young man. Just by talking with you,
rumors can start flying.
That's a bit over the top, and besides,
doesn’t it feel stifling?
It's to protect her. Everything is for that girl.
I will do anything to protect that girl.
That's a rather alarming opinion.
If you were to hurt her,
I might kill you, you know.
If you don't want to end up dead,
stop messing with her.
Jennifer is just,
not someone I have anything to talk about.
Oh, is that so?
I don't care if you're a detective or whatever, stop prying like that. It's infuriating!
Didn't I say I have nothing to talk about?
Look, I don't want her to have to deal with someone like you.
I don't want her going out with someone like you.
Someone like her is not calm at all.
You may not know this because you're an ordinary person, but she's a woman who has stabbed people.
Stabbed someone?
She has a face that looks innocent at first glance, but she's actually a scary woman with a lot of bloodlust.
I don't even want to talk about women like her.
Well, it’s my first time working with her, so I don't really know.
She’s a much more senior actress,
so there’s probably a lot I can learn.
I don't want you pointing that out to me.
What am I to you? I can’t deal with all these questions.
The director says
he holds you in high esteem. He’s given you a seal of approval to succeed as an actress.
That's amazing. As expected of
him.
But is it really true?
I feel kind of uneasy about it.
I was pleasantly surprised the director opened the path for me to become an actress. But that girl is under incredible pressure.
I think being in a Fabar production for your debut is a blessing,
but that means failure isn’t an option. It’s a pretty tough situation.
I’m happy about the director’s assessment,
but it’s a bit of a mixed feeling.
Why don’t you just talk to her?
You’re friends with Guy, right? Tell him to never again
get close to her.
Did he do something bad?
Honestly, I didn’t want him to come to today’s party at all!
Ugh, stop it, I can’t stand this!
Who’s that?
Guy's fiancée.
Oh really? Then you need to make sure you keep Guy on a tight leash.
It’s fine. She’s a strong one.
Is it really? It’s not my concern, though.
Ugh, why do we have to talk about this?
Such talks have nothing to do with me.
For me,
I only hope that
is safe.
That’s all.
Of course. I am her agent, after all.
Please don’t talk about such ominous things.
※※※ It’s a bug ※※※
